⇢ ˗ˏˋ cross’ eye sockets widen, observing you as the music of the party plays in the back. an intense glare from him is given to the person who has you pressed up against a wall.

“what the fuck?” he mutters to himself in disbelief as jealousy bubbles strongly inside of him, an intense expression painted on his features.

did that person not get it at all? you’re his. he’s been trying so damn hard to make sure that everyone at this party — which he never wanted to go to in the first place — knew you were his and his only. holding hands with you, kissing you, flirting with you… everything he could think of.

yet here you were, pressed up against that wall, just a few feet away from cross. he can’t even handle the thought of you being taken away from him, so he begins walking up to the person who has you pinned to the wall.

“hey, this is my partner,” he states to them firmly, wrapping his arm around your shoulder protectively. “and they’re not interested. let’s go, babe.”

cross brings you away from the wall, his grip on your hand tight as he makes his way out of the house, your hand held tightly in his. you frantically ask what he’s doing, but he’s only focused on one thing and one thing only right now. and that’s making sure you know you’re his.

he opens his car door and shoves you inside the back harshly yet carefully. he crawls on top of you and grabs your face. even though he’s beyo
